rawAssistant: Strength of character is paramount. Not just physical prowess, but also the courage to stand by one's convictions and defend what is dear. A true trainer respects their craft, yet remains humble before the power of nature and the creatures that inhabit it. I have watched Thornbeast grow strong under my guidance, its resolve forged in the heart of this forest.
